features: DESIGN : High quality detangler hair brush is specially-designed to untangle stubborn knotted strands effortlessly. Ergonomically designed brush handle fits right into the palm of your hand and makes brushing your hair faster and easier.
HIGH QUALITY BRUSH : 413 flexible bristles that will gently glide through knots creating less friction than ordinary hairbrushes resulting in reduced hair loss and breakage.

MOST EFFECTIVE DETANGLER AVAILABLE: Super smooth operator that works with any type of hair. Wet, dry, thick curly. Stimulates your scalp for a lovely relaxing feeling, the firm but not hard bristles will gently massage your scalp as you brush, it’s a lovely way to relax.
IDEAL FOR KIDS TOO : Great for adults and kids.
